channel.title: beginsisters_official TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from beginsisters_official

item.title: Sunday slow vibes . Coffee, music, and a little dance to reset the soul . Nothing fancy… just moving our bodies and feeling grateful 🤍What’s your favorite Sunday ritual? Ambiance douceur du dimanche . Un café, de la musique et quelques pas de danse pour
item.description: Sunday slow vibes . Coffee, music, and a little dance to reset the soul . Nothing fancy… just moving our bodies and feeling grateful 🤍What’s your favorite Sunday ritual? Ambiance douceur du dimanche . Un café, de la musique et quelques pas de danse pour
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy birthday to the silliest little sis⭐️🎶🤗 (not so little anymore🥲) 18 years of life with my best friend. You are the funniest, most talented, beautiful, kind and incredible sister I could ask for! 💋 I truly believe you have a very bright futur in fro
item.description: Happy birthday to the silliest little sis⭐️🎶🤗 (not so little anymore🥲) 18 years of life with my best friend. You are the funniest, most talented, beautiful, kind and incredible sister I could ask for! 💋 I truly believe you have a very bright futur in fro
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Good morning friends🤗! We hope you are feeling amazing this morning ☀️! I (annflo) wanted to thank you all so much for the wonderful birthday wishes you sent me yesterday 🥹🙏🏻 We are extremely grateful to have a such a wonderful community ❤️ Have a wonderf
item.description: Good morning friends🤗! We hope you are feeling amazing this morning ☀️! I (annflo) wanted to thank you all so much for the wonderful birthday wishes you sent me yesterday 🥹🙏🏻 We are extremely grateful to have a such a wonderful community ❤️ Have a wonderf
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Good morning world! We had to remake this dance in honor of Pitbull reposting it! We can’t believe it🤩🤩 Bon matin tout le monde!! Nous devions refaire cette danse en l’honneur de Pitbull qui a repartagé notre vidéo! On arrive pas à y croire🤩🤩 Dc: @Miami
item.description: Good morning world! We had to remake this dance in honor of Pitbull reposting it! We can’t believe it🤩🤩 Bon matin tout le monde!! Nous devions refaire cette danse en l’honneur de Pitbull qui a repartagé notre vidéo! On arrive pas à y croire🤩🤩 Dc: @Miami
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Thursday friends!🤗 We are loving our new sweat set from @hoakaswimwear ! So comfy and cute!! Tell us which one is your favourite ❤️ or 💛?🥰 Bon jeudi à tous ! 🤗 On adore nos nouvel ensemble de @hoakaswimwear ! Tellement confortable et mignon !! Dite
item.description: Happy Thursday friends!🤗 We are loving our new sweat set from @hoakaswimwear ! So comfy and cute!! Tell us which one is your favourite ❤️ or 💛?🥰 Bon jeudi à tous ! 🤗 On adore nos nouvel ensemble de @hoakaswimwear ! Tellement confortable et mignon !! Dite
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: It’s Fri-YAY friends!! Who’s excited for the weekend and Valentine’s Day?🎀❤️ C’est vendredi les amis!! Qui a hâte à la fin de semaine et à la Saint-Valentin?🎀❤️ Dc: ?? (please tag them in the comments) We are @Ophé and @annflo_begin dancers and sisters
item.description: It’s Fri-YAY friends!! Who’s excited for the weekend and Valentine’s Day?🎀❤️ C’est vendredi les amis!! Qui a hâte à la fin de semaine et à la Saint-Valentin?🎀❤️ Dc: ?? (please tag them in the comments) We are @Ophé and @annflo_begin dancers and sisters
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Valentine’s Day everyone ❤️! We are so grateful for your support and all your love! To celebrate the day of love, tag someone in the comments and tell them why they mean so much to you 🥰! Beautiful outfit by @Curated by Muse ❤️ Joyeuse Saint-Valenti
item.description: Happy Valentine’s Day everyone ❤️! We are so grateful for your support and all your love! To celebrate the day of love, tag someone in the comments and tell them why they mean so much to you 🥰! Beautiful outfit by @Curated by Muse ❤️ Joyeuse Saint-Valenti
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Sunday world! Did you enjoy Valentine’s Day? Tell us more about It in the comments!🌹💐💕 Bon Dimanche les amis!! Avez-Vous passé une bonne St-Valentin? Dites-nous en plus dans les commentaires! 🌹💋💕 Dc: OTTC We are @Ophé and @annflo_begin dancers and
item.description: Happy Sunday world! Did you enjoy Valentine’s Day? Tell us more about It in the comments!🌹💐💕 Bon Dimanche les amis!! Avez-Vous passé une bonne St-Valentin? Dites-nous en plus dans les commentaires! 🌹💋💕 Dc: OTTC We are @Ophé and @annflo_begin dancers and
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Monday friends 😊! Ready for a new week?! I know we are ! Valentine’s Day, this weekend, really recharged our hearts and we hope yours too ❤️! Tell us what you did on the 14th to celebrate love ! 💬💗Have an awesome week 🥰 Bon lundi à tous 😊 ! Prêts po
item.description: Happy Monday friends 😊! Ready for a new week?! I know we are ! Valentine’s Day, this weekend, really recharged our hearts and we hope yours too ❤️! Tell us what you did on the 14th to celebrate love ! 💬💗Have an awesome week 🥰 Bon lundi à tous 😊 ! Prêts po
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Good morning friends!! 🫶🏻🫶🏻 Hope you had a good night of sleep! What are your plans for the week? Bon matin les amis!! 💕💕 On espère que vous avez bien dormi. Quels sont vos plans pour la semaine? Dc: @OL We are @ophelie_begin and @annflo_begin dancers a
item.description: Good morning friends!! 🫶🏻🫶🏻 Hope you had a good night of sleep! What are your plans for the week? Bon matin les amis!! 💕💕 On espère que vous avez bien dormi. Quels sont vos plans pour la semaine? Dc: @OL We are @ophelie_begin and @annflo_begin dancers a
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Wednesday friends! 🤗 We hope you are doing amazing! We loved this choreography so we had to do it again!! 💃🏻 Q of the day 🤔 : who’s your favourite artist? Tell us in the comments 💬🫶🏻! Bon mercredi à tous ! 🤗 On espère que vous allez super bien ! On
item.description: Happy Wednesday friends! 🤗 We hope you are doing amazing! We loved this choreography so we had to do it again!! 💃🏻 Q of the day 🤔 : who’s your favourite artist? Tell us in the comments 💬🫶🏻! Bon mercredi à tous ! 🤗 On espère que vous allez super bien ! On
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Good morning world!! ☺️🫶🏻It was fun to participate to this trend acording to our differents personalities as sisters. Tell us in the comments if you are team AnnFlo or team Ophé? Bon matin tout le monde! ☺️🫶🏻On a eu du plaisir à essayer cette trend selon

item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: FRIDAYYY VIBESS!! Pew Pew Pee 😆! This trend is so funny you have to try it! Tag your sibling in the comments and try it out 😆! Have a wonderful day friends 🫶🏻 Ambiance du vendredi !! Pew Pew Pee 😆 ! Cette tendance est tellement drôle, il faut absolument l
item.description: FRIDAYYY VIBESS!! Pew Pew Pee 😆! This trend is so funny you have to try it! Tag your sibling in the comments and try it out 😆! Have a wonderful day friends 🫶🏻 Ambiance du vendredi !! Pew Pew Pee 😆 ! Cette tendance est tellement drôle, il faut absolument l
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Good morning world!! It’s finally the weekend!! ❤️💋We have a pretty exciting event tonight! What about you? Bon matin tout le monde!! C’est enfin la fin de semaine!! 💋❤️ Ce soir on assiste à un super événement! Et toi? We are @Ophé and @annflo_begin dance
item.description: Good morning world!! It’s finally the weekend!! ❤️💋We have a pretty exciting event tonight! What about you? Bon matin tout le monde!! C’est enfin la fin de semaine!! 💋❤️ Ce soir on assiste à un super événement! Et toi? We are @Ophé and @annflo_begin dance
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Sunday slow vibes . Coffee, music, and a little dance to reset the soul . Nothing fancy… just moving our bodies and feeling grateful .This morning, we are spending family time watching the Olympic hockey final! Who do you think is going to win? 😊 Ambiance
item.description: Sunday slow vibes . Coffee, music, and a little dance to reset the soul . Nothing fancy… just moving our bodies and feeling grateful .This morning, we are spending family time watching the Olympic hockey final! Who do you think is going to win? 😊 Ambiance
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Good morning friends! How was your weekend? We Hope you took a Little bit of time to rest.🫶🏻⭐️ We had so much fun recreating this dance! Bon matin les amis! Comment c’est passé votre fin de semaine? On espère que vous avez pris un peu de temps pour vous
item.description: Good morning friends! How was your weekend? We Hope you took a Little bit of time to rest.🫶🏻⭐️ We had so much fun recreating this dance! Bon matin les amis! Comment c’est passé votre fin de semaine? On espère que vous avez pris un peu de temps pour vous
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Tuesday friends 😊! Energy to the max today!! We are sending you the best vibes for a positive and a successful day ❤️ Joyeux mardi les amis 😊 ! Énergie au maximum aujourd'hui !! On vous envoie les meilleures ondes pour une journée positive et plein
item.description: Happy Tuesday friends 😊! Energy to the max today!! We are sending you the best vibes for a positive and a successful day ❤️ Joyeux mardi les amis 😊 ! Énergie au maximum aujourd'hui !! On vous envoie les meilleures ondes pour une journée positive et plein
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Hey Friends! How are you doing? We are sending you extra positive energy for the middle of the week❤️🌟🫶🏻 Salut les Ami/es! Comment allez-vous? On vous envoie pleins d’ondes positives pour le milieu de la semaine🌟❤️🫶🏻 Dc: please tag them! We are @Ophé and

item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: It’s Thursday already!🙌🏻🙌🏻 Do you guys also feel like 2026 has been flying by lately ?? It feels like yesterday was new years, but February is almost over 🤯 Anyway we hope you will have a fun day today!! Smile and feel the positive energy 😌😄! Déjà jeudi !
item.description: It’s Thursday already!🙌🏻🙌🏻 Do you guys also feel like 2026 has been flying by lately ?? It feels like yesterday was new years, but February is almost over 🤯 Anyway we hope you will have a fun day today!! Smile and feel the positive energy 😌😄! Déjà jeudi !
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Good morning Friends! Another dance trend to this song!! Tell us in comments if you prefer Pink 🩷 or Blue 💙? Bon matin les amis! Une autre danse sur cette chanson!! Dites-nous dans les commentaires si vous préférez le rose 🩷 ou le bleu 💙? Dc: @OL We ar

item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Good morning world !!❤️ “ Shake that healthy butt!!” and let’s the bad energy go away!!😆🙌🏻 We wish you a fun and happy weekend 🫶🏻🫶🏻 Bonjour tout le monde !! ❤️ « Bougez vos fesses ! » et chassez les mauvaises ondes !! 😆🙌🏻 Nous vous souhaitons un week-en

item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Sunday my Friends. Make sure you take time to rest before the new week! 🩷🩷 Bon dimanche les amis! Assurez-Vous de prendre du temps pour vous reposer avant le début de la semaine 🩷🩷 Dc: @lea._.meep We are @Ophé and @annflo_begin dancers and sisters
item.description: Happy Sunday my Friends. Make sure you take time to rest before the new week! 🩷🩷 Bon dimanche les amis! Assurez-Vous de prendre du temps pour vous reposer avant le début de la semaine 🩷🩷 Dc: @lea._.meep We are @Ophé and @annflo_begin dancers and sisters
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Maximum energy Monday !! Today’s video is dedicated to our extraordinary mom who’s birthday is today🥳 We are so grateful to have you in our life and we love you to the moon and back 🫶🏻 Everyone help us make our mom’s day special by writing a little birthd
item.description: Maximum energy Monday !! Today’s video is dedicated to our extraordinary mom who’s birthday is today🥳 We are so grateful to have you in our life and we love you to the moon and back 🫶🏻 Everyone help us make our mom’s day special by writing a little birthd
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Good morning world! If ever you’re are having a hard time, blame it on the boogie!! Today is about positive energy only🫶🏻🫶🏻 Bon matin tout le monde! Si jamais vous passez un mauvais moment, mettez la faute sur le « boogie »!! Aujourd’hui, on vous souhaite
item.description: Good morning world! If ever you’re are having a hard time, blame it on the boogie!! Today is about positive energy only🫶🏻🫶🏻 Bon matin tout le monde! Si jamais vous passez un mauvais moment, mettez la faute sur le « boogie »!! Aujourd’hui, on vous souhaite
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Wednesday friends 🤗! We absolutely loved this trend so you know we had to do it again!! It’s so much fun and has all the positive energy we need 🙌🏻 Tell us in the comments how’s your week been going so far ? ☺️ Bon mercredi à tous 🤗 ! On a adoré ce
item.description: Happy Wednesday friends 🤗! We absolutely loved this trend so you know we had to do it again!! It’s so much fun and has all the positive energy we need 🙌🏻 Tell us in the comments how’s your week been going so far ? ☺️ Bon mercredi à tous 🤗 ! On a adoré ce
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: This one’s for Armani 🎂✨ @TheRealArmaniHines Celebrating 23 years of talent, creativity, and passion. From the way you move to the way you draw your world…you inspire. 🎨🖤 Let’s all wish him a magical birthday and a year where every dream he sketches beco
item.description: This one’s for Armani 🎂✨ @TheRealArmaniHines Celebrating 23 years of talent, creativity, and passion. From the way you move to the way you draw your world…you inspire. 🎨🖤 Let’s all wish him a magical birthday and a year where every dream he sketches beco
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Friday friends!❤️ What a week for us this one has been! We are so busy with school, creating choreography and side quest 😜! But so grateful for everything we are living 🥰☀️! Tell us one thing in the comments you are grateful for this week 💬☺️! Bon
item.description: Happy Friday friends!❤️ What a week for us this one has been! We are so busy with school, creating choreography and side quest 😜! But so grateful for everything we are living 🥰☀️! Tell us one thing in the comments you are grateful for this week 💬☺️! Bon
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Good morning world! We had to hit this dance again. So fun🌟🌟🤍Cool remix by @Showmusik Bon matin tout le monde! On devait absolument refaire cette danse. On l’adore. 🌟🌟🫶🏻 Dc: @ellalucas00 We are @Ophé and @annflo_begin dancers and sisters from Canada 🇨🇦
item.description: Good morning world! We had to hit this dance again. So fun🌟🌟🤍Cool remix by @Showmusik Bon matin tout le monde! On devait absolument refaire cette danse. On l’adore. 🌟🌟🫶🏻 Dc: @ellalucas00 We are @Ophé and @annflo_begin dancers and sisters from Canada 🇨🇦
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Let’s go!! Happy Sunday friends!! 🫶🏻 We hope you had an awesome weekend so far! Try out this trend with a friend or your partner for a good challenge 😉💪 Have an awesome rest of your weekend 🫶🏻❤️ C’est parti !! Bon dimanche à tous !! 🫶🏻 On espère que vous
item.description: Let’s go!! Happy Sunday friends!! 🫶🏻 We hope you had an awesome weekend so far! Try out this trend with a friend or your partner for a good challenge 😉💪 Have an awesome rest of your weekend 🫶🏻❤️ C’est parti !! Bon dimanche à tous !! 🫶🏻 On espère que vous
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Good morning friends! How was your weekend? We Hope you had a little bit of time to rest.🫶🏻⭐️For us, it’s our last week at school before spring break! 🌺 Bon matin les amis! Comment c’est passé votre fin de semaine? On espère que vous avez pris un peu de t
